title: Chemical Investigations of the stem-bark of Eugeniafruticosa Roxb. and bark of Eugenia wallichii Wight Ill.
author: S. Ghosh Majumdar
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: The isolation of friedelin, epi-friedelanol and betulinic acid as its methyl ester are common in both the species. But  β -sitosterol has been isolated only from the bark of   \(E.\)   \(wallichii.\)
steps_raw: The isolation of friedelin, epi-friedelanol and betulinic acid as its methyl ester are common in both the species. But  β -sitosterol has been isolated only from the bark of   \(E.\)   \(wallichii.\)
